attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
                  CASE
                     WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY = -999
                     THEN
                        RANDOM (1000000, 1001800) * -1
                     WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY = -998
                     THEN
                        RANDOM (1005000, 1006800) * -1
                     WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY = -997
                     THEN
                        RANDOM (1010000, 1011800) * -1
                     ELSE
                        WI.PRODUCT_KEY
                  END
                     PRODUCT_KEY,
                  CASE
                     WHEN WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999
                     THEN
                        RANDOM (1000000, 1001800) * -1
                     ELSE
                        WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
                  END
                     SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
                  WI.CHARGES_FLG,
                  WI.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
                  WI.IC_REVENUE_FLG,
                  WI.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
                  WI.MISC_FLG,
                  WI.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
                  WI.SERVICE_FLG,
                  WI.REVENUE_FLG,
                  WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
                  WI.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
                  CASE
                     WHEN WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999
                     THEN
                        RANDOM (1000000, 1001800) * -1
                     ELSE
                        WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
                  END
                     END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
                  WI.EXTENDED_QTY,
                  WI.EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
                  WI.EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
                  WI.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                  WI.COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
                  WI.COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
                  WI.COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
                  WI.COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
                  WI.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
                  WI.COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
                  WI.COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
                  WI.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
                  WI.DV_REV_STD_COST_ADJ_AMT,
                  WI.DV_REV_ADJ_AMT,
                  WI.DV_REV_ADJ_EXT_LST_AMT,
                  WI.DV_DRCT_REV_ADJ_AMT,
                  WI.DV_DRCT_REV_ST_CST_ADJ_AMT,
                  WI.DV_INDRCT_REV_ADJ_AMT,
                  WI.DV_INDRCT_RV_ST_CST_AD_AMT,
                  WI.DV_STD_COST_AMT,
                  WI.DV_ADJ_EXT_LIST_AMT,
                  WI.DV_UNITS_WZFILT_NET_QTY,
                  WI.DV_GROSS_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY,
                  WI.DV_NET_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY,
                  WI.DV_MKTSHR_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY,
                  /* AE Upload*/
                  WI.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
                  WI.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
                  WI.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG,
                  CASE
                     WHEN WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -999
                     THEN
                        RANDOM (1000000, 1001800) * -1
                     WHEN WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -998
                     THEN
                        RANDOM (1005000, 1006800) * -1
                     WHEN WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -997
                     THEN
                        RANDOM (1010000, 1011800) * -1
                     ELSE
                        WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
                  END
                     DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                  WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                  WI.CALENDAR_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
                  WI.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
                  WI.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT1 /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
                                           ,
                  WI.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
                  WI.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
				  WI.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
             FROM 
/*STGDB.WI_RSTD_INV_REV_PID_TERIND_ADJ WI  */
/*Performance changes 10/01/2021: Disabled intermittent table WI_RSTD_INV_REV_PID_TERIND_ADJ and loading directly from WI_RSTD_INV_REV_MES_FOR_AGGR table */ 
 (SELECT WINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
                               AS FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
                            WINV.PRODUCT_KEY,
                            WINV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
                            WINV.DV_CHARGES_FLG  AS CHARGES_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
                               AS CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG AS IC_REVENUE_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG
                               AS INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_MISC_FLG     AS MISC_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG
                               AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_SERVICE_FLG  AS SERVICE_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_REVENUE_FLG  AS REVENUE_FLG,
                            WINV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
                            WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
                            WINV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
                            0                    EXTENDED_QTY,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY))
                               EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY))
                               EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT))
                               COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                            SUM (
                               ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT))
                               COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
                            SUM (
                               ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM))
                               COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT))
                               COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT))
                               COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT))
                               COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT))
                               COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT))
                               COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
                            SUM (
                               ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT))
                               COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
                            SUM (
                               ZEROIFNULL (
                                  CASE
                                     WHEN WINV.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN
                                             ('NMS', ' WARRANTY')
                                     THEN
                                        WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT
                                     ELSE
                                        0
                                  END))
                               DV_REV_STD_COST_ADJ_AMT,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT))
                               DV_REV_ADJ_AMT,
                            0                    DV_REV_ADJ_EXT_LST_AMT,
                            0                    DV_DRCT_REV_ADJ_AMT,
                            0                    DV_DRCT_REV_ST_CST_ADJ_AMT,
                            SUM (
                               ZEROIFNULL (
                                  CASE
                                     WHEN WINV.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID =
                                             'Indirect'
                                     THEN
                                        WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
                                     ELSE
                                        0
                                  END))
                               DV_INDRCT_REV_ADJ_AMT,
                            SUM (
                               ZEROIFNULL (
                                  CASE
                                     WHEN WINV.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID =
                                             'Indirect'
                                     THEN
                                        WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT
                                     ELSE
                                        0
                                  END))
                               DV_INDRCT_RV_ST_CST_AD_AMT,
                            SUM (
                               ZEROIFNULL (
                                  CASE
                                     WHEN WINV.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN
                                             ('NMS', 'WARRANTY')
                                     THEN
                                        WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT
                                     ELSE
                                        0
                                  END))
                               DV_STD_COST_AMT,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT))
                               DV_ADJ_EXT_LIST_AMT,
                            0                    DV_UNITS_WZFILT_NET_QTY,
                            SUM (
                               ZEROIFNULL (
                                  CASE
                                     WHEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT = 0
                                     THEN
                                        0
                                     ELSE
                                        WINV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY
                                  END))
                               DV_GROSS_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY,
                            SUM (
                               ZEROIFNULL (
                                  CASE
                                     WHEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT = 0
                                     THEN
                                        0
                                     ELSE
                                        WINV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY
                                  END))
                               DV_NET_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY,
                            0                    DV_MKTSHR_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY,
                            WINV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                            WINV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                            WINV.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
                            WINV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
                            WINV.CALENDAR_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
                            WINV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
                            SUM (ZEROIFNULL (WINV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT))
                               DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT1,
                            WINV.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
                            WINV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
							WINV.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
                       FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_INV_REV_MES_FOR_AGGR WINV
                            INNER JOIN
                            (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
                               FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_REV_QTR_AGGR_BATCHES
                              WHERE INC_FLAG = 'Y'/*  AND RUN_BATCH_ID=5    */
                                                  ) WI_REV
                               ON WINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =
                                     WI_REV.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
                      WHERE     WINV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN
                                   ('IND_ADJ', 'DRCT_AS_T')
                            AND WINV.L3_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN
                                   ('2-TIER DEF. AND PRIOR MNTH REC',
                                    '2-TIER SPECIFIC RESERVE',
                                    '2-TIER SPECIFIC RESERVE - MANUAL',
                                    'CORPORATE AR',
                                    'CORPORATE RESERVE OTHER',
                                    '2TIER CONTRA OFFSET',
                                    '2TIER RMA OFFSET',
                                    'POS ADJUSTMENTS REVENUE OFFSET',
                                    'CORPORATE RESERVE OTHER_COST',
                                    'POS ADJUSTMENTS COST OFFSET',
                                    '2T INVENTORY COST ADJ OFFSET',
                                    'CORPORATE AR_COST')
                   GROUP BY WINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
                            WINV.PRODUCT_KEY,
                            WINV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
                            WINV.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_MISC_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
                            WINV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
                            WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
                            WINV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
                            WINV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG,
                            WINV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                            WINV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                            WINV.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
                            WINV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
                            WINV.CALENDAR_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
                            WINV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
                            WINV.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
                            WINV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
							WINV.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY) WI
